data.title: Asia Orient Holdings Reschedules AGM
data.description:
Asia Orient Holdings (DE:ASD1) has released an update.

Asia Orient Holdings Limited has announced a rescheduling of its Annual General Meeting (AGM) to September 4, 2024, due to administrative reasons. Shareholders must lodge share transfers by August 29, 2024, to be eligible to vote, as the company’s register will be closed from August 30 to September 4, 2024. Further details and the notice for the Rescheduled AGM will be provided to shareholders shortly.

For further insights into DE:ASD1 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Broadleaf Co., Ltd. Returns to Profitability in Q2
data.description:
Broadleaf Co., Ltd. (JP:3673) has released an update.

Broadleaf Co., Ltd. reports a return to profitability in the second quarter of fiscal year 2024 with an operating profit of 66 million yen, a significant improvement from the previous year’s loss. The company’s total assets and equity have also seen an increase, with a forecasted year-end dividend of 2.00 yen per share. Broadleaf maintains a stable financial position, with no changes in significant subsidiaries, accounting policies, or estimates.

For further insights into JP:3673 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Coca-Cola HBC Announces Board Resignation
data.description:
Coca Cola HBC (GB:CCH) has released an update.

Coca-Cola HBC AG has announced the resignation of Anna Diamantopoulou, a key independent non-executive director, effective September 16, 2024, due to her decision to pursue a leadership role in Greece’s PASOK political party. The company’s Chairman expressed gratitude for her contributions and confirmed that a search for her replacement has begun, with shareholder approval to follow at an extraordinary general meeting. The company is a major consumer packaged goods business and a strategic bottling partner of The Coca-Cola Company, operating in 29 countries.

For further insights into GB:CCH stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Ausnutria Dairy Corp Plans Key Board Meeting
data.description:
Ausnutria Dairy Corp. Ltd. (HK:1717) has released an update.

Ausnutria Dairy Corporation Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on August 27, 2024, to discuss and potentially approve the company’s interim financial results for the first half of the year and to consider declaring an interim dividend. The meeting will be a crucial indicator for shareholders regarding the company’s performance and future dividend payouts.

For further insights into HK:1717 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: China XLX Fertiliser Unanimously Passes Key Resolution
data.description:
China XLX Fertiliser Ltd. (HK:1866) has released an update.

China XLX Fertiliser Ltd. announced the successful passage of a resolution during their Extraordinary General Meeting held on August 9, 2024, with unanimous shareholder approval. The resolution pertains to the approval and ratification of the Framework Agreement and the Definitive Transaction Documents, as well as authorizing directors to implement the transactions detailed therein. This move could signify strategic developments within the company, which may interest shareholders and potential investors.

For further insights into HK:1866 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: OVANTI LIMITED Launches Share Entitlement Issue
data.description:
IOUpay Limited (AU:OVT) has released an update.

OVANTI LIMITED has announced a pro-rata non-renounceable entitlement issue, offering one new share at $0.004 each for every three shares held to raise up to $2,030,140. This offer is highlighted as highly speculative and intended only for certain international investors, excluding a number of countries. Investors are urged to consult professional advisors and consider the company’s continuous disclosure obligations as a listed entity before participating in the offer.

For further insights into AU:OVT stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bank of America Alters Stake in Centrica PLC
data.description:
Centrica (GB:CNA) has released an update.

Centrica PLC has reported a significant change in share ownership, with Bank of America Corporation crossing the notification threshold with a combined voting rights total of 3.215885%. The change, resulting from both direct shareholding and various financial instruments such as physical swaps and cash-settled swaps, was officially notified to Centrica on August 8, 2024.

For further insights into GB:CNA stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Zhongliang Holdings Reports Mid-Year Sales Data
data.description:
Zhongliang Holdings Group Company Limited (HK:2772) has released an update.

Zhongliang Holdings Group Company Limited has reported unaudited operating statistics for July 2024, revealing that their aggregated contracted sales and gross floor area from January to July reached approximately RMB11.02 billion and 1,045,000 square meters, respectively. The Group’s average selling price for this period was around RMB10,500 per square meter, with a slight increase to RMB10,700 per square meter in July alone. Investors are cautioned by the company to consult professional advice and not to rely solely on these preliminary figures when dealing in the company’s securities.

For further insights into HK:2772 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
data.author: TipRanks HongKong Auto-Generated Newsdesk

data.title: Eminence Enterprise Calls for Vote on Luxury Property Sale
data.description:
Eminence Enterprise Limited (HK:0616) has released an update.

Eminence Enterprise Limited has announced a Special General Meeting to be held on September 3, 2024, for shareholders to vote on the proposed sale of four luxury apartment units in Singapore at a price of S$12 million. The company seeks shareholder approval to ratify the disposal and authorize directors to finalize the transaction. The meeting will take place at the company’s headquarters in Kowloon, Hong Kong.

For further insights into HK:0616 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Computershare Reports Significant Shareholder Changes
data.description:
Computershare Limited (AU:CPU) has released an update.

Computershare Limited has experienced a change in the interests of a substantial holder, with details regarding the voting power before and after the change, and specifics on the relevant interests in voting securities following the adjustment. The update includes various entities under State Street Global Advisors and State Street Bank and Trust Company, signifying a shift in control over voting rights and the power to dispose of securities.
